paywall.benefit_1_desc: Create as many trackers and metrics as you need to log what matters to you.
paywall.benefit_2_desc: Gain insights into your tracking data with advanced charts and statistics.
paywall.benefit_3_desc: Easily export your data for backup or further analysis.
paywall.benefit_4_desc: Switching phones? Easily import your existing data and continue tracking seamlessly.
paywall.benefit_5_desc: By subscribing, you support the ongoing development and maintenance of this app.
